options.name: Nubra Organic Retreat, Hunder
options.description: Eco-friendly camp with organic food, near sand dunes and double-humped camels

options.name: Diskit Village Homestays
options.description: Traditional Ladakhi homes near Diskit Monastery. Authentic local experience.
options.contact: Ask at Diskit village or through local travel agents

options.name: Sumur Homestays
options.description: Quiet village setting near Sumur Monastery. Apple orchards.

options.name: Spangmik Homestays
options.description: Closest village to Pangong Lake. Basic but scenic.
options.contact: Ask locally or book through Leh travel agents

options.name: Merak Village Homestays
options.description: Quieter than Spangmik. Beautiful lake views.
options.contact: Limited connectivity — book in advance through Leh agents

options.name: Pangong Camping Sites
options.description: Designated camping areas near the lake. Various operators.

options.name: Leh Old Town Homestays
options.description: Traditional Ladakhi houses in the historic old town area

options.name: Changspa Area Guesthouses
options.description: Popular backpacker area with many budget options

options.name: Korzok Village Homestays
options.description: Only settlement near Tso Moriri. Traditional nomadic culture.
options.contact: Ask at Korzok village or through Leh agents

options.name: Tso Moriri Camps
options.description: Seasonal tent camps near the lake.
options.contact: Book through Leh travel agents in advance
